overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character crosses neon-lit streets, walks past steam vents and building stairs, and ascends to an elevated plaza overlooking a busy multi-level highway.

events.description: crossing from asphalt crosswalk onto concrete sidewalk
passing steam vents emitting smoke on the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk and continuing along the city sidewalk

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
large illuminated advertisement sign on building facade
street vents emitting white steam or smoke
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing a wide yellow-striped crosswalk in a neon-lit downtown area. After reaching the sidewalk, they pass steam vents emitting smoke while walking past tall glass skyscrapers adorned with bright billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with building stairs and overhang

events.description: slight right turn to follow the curved sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing a large building with prominent concrete stairs

notable_agents.action: descending the concrete stairs on the building facade

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase attached to the building exterior
dark overhanging structure above the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk beside a building featuring wide exterior concrete stairs. Pedestrians are seen descending the stairs as the camera moves forward under a building overhang.

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at the intersection
reaching the opposite sidewalk and continuing forward

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection with traffic lights while vehicles wait nearby

notable_agents.action: black car waiting at the traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: large blue and red billboard with 'CIRRUS' text
marked pedestrian crossing across multi-lane road
illuminated traffic signals showing green for pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a busy intersection marked with yellow grid lines, passing under traffic lights. A large 'CIRRUS' billboard is visible on the left as vehicles wait at the red light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway leading to elevated plaza

events.description: ascending concrete stairs to upper pedestrian level
entering the elevated plaza with reflective flooring

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and climbing stairs to reach an upper plaza level

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading up to the elevated pedestrian plaza
partially covered passage under building structure
polished dark flooring reflecting the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and ascends a set of concrete stairs leading to an elevated pedestrian area. Upon reaching the top, they enter a plaza with highly reflective dark flooring that mirrors the surrounding neon billboards.

events.description: approaching the plaza edge overlooking the highway below
slowing and panning to view the traffic on the multi-level highway

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and approaching the railing to observe the highway traffic below

notable_agents.action: sitting on a concrete bench in the plaza

entered.detail: elevated roadways with multiple lanes of traffic below the plaza
safety barrier at the edge of the plaza overlooking the roads
large planters with green foliage arranged around the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the reflective plaza surface, passing potted plants and digital billboards. They approach the edge railing to overlook a busy multi-level highway with dense traffic flowing below, while neon signs illuminate the surrounding skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit downtown district that gradually ascends from the street level to an elevated urban plaza. It begins with the character crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk and passing steam vents beneath towering glass skyscrapers adorned with bright billboards. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts along a sidewalk past wide concrete stairs and under a building overhang before crossing a busy intersection marked by yellow grid lines and a large Cirrus billboard. The perspective then climbs a set of concrete stairs, transitioning from the street into a plaza with highly reflective dark flooring that mirrors the surrounding lights. Finally, the character walks past potted plants and digital displays toward a railing, revealing a sweeping view of a dense, multi-level highway flowing beneath the glow of illuminated skyscrapers.
